title: lespedeza × bicoloba
intro: Lespedeza × bicoloba, also known as Korean bush clover, is a perennial legume native to East Asia, characterized by its pink or white flowers and purple seed pods. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lespedeza × bicoloba include its ability to reduce fever, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Lespedeza × bicoloba can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
